steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/theme.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; WP_Filesystem(); foreach ( array( 'twentytwentyfive', 'twentytwentyfour', 'twentytwentythree' ) as $theme ) { if ( wp_get_theme( $theme )->exists() ) { delete_theme( $theme ); } } $plugins = array( 'akismet/akismet.php', 'hello.php' ); $installed = array_keys( get_plugins() ); $to_remove = array_values( array_intersect( $plugins, $installed ) ); if ( ! empty( $to_remove ) ) { deactivate_plugins( $to_remove, true ); delete_plugins( $to_remove ); } ?>

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $all = get_posts( array( 'post_type' => array( 'post', 'page' ), 'post_status' => 'any', 'numberposts' => -1, 'fields' => 'ids' ) ); foreach ( $all as $id ) { wp_delete_post( $id, true ); } ?>
